title: T-008 — Drizzle migration: oee_snapshots table + uniqueness V-PROD-10 + RLS
prompt:
# T-008 — Drizzle migration: oee_snapshots

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.9, §16.4 V-PROD-10/25, §5.5 90d retention

## Goal
Create oee_snapshots per §9.9 with GENERATED oee_pct column, UNIQUE per (tenant, line, shift, snapshot_minute) per V-PROD-10, V-PROD-25 component CHECKs in [0,100], 90-day retention note.

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/oee-snapshots.ts: PK id BIGSERIAL, tenant_id, line_id text, shift_id text, snapshot_minute TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, availability_pct/performance_pct/quality_pct NUMERIC(5,2) each with CHECK BETWEEN 0 AND 100 (V-PROD-25), oee_pct NUMERIC(5,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (availability_pct*performance_pct*quality_pct/10000) STORED, active_wo_id, output_qty_delta NUMERIC(12,3), downtime_min_delta INTEGER, waste_qty_delta NUMERIC(12,3), ideal_cycle_time_sec NUMERIC(8,2), created_at default now. UNIQUE (tenant_id, line_id, shift_id, snapshot_minute) (V-PROD-10). Index idx_oee_line_time (line_id, snapshot_minute DESC). RLS by tenant_id.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/oee-snapshots.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_snapshots.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/oee-snapshots-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given two INSERTs share (tenant,line,shift,snapshot_minute), when both run, then second fails with unique_violation (V-PROD-10)
2. Given INSERT availability_pct=120, when run, then CHECK BETWEEN 0 AND 100 rejects (V-PROD-25)
3. Given INSERT with A/P/Q values, when row queried, then oee_pct equals A*P*Q/10000 within ±0.01 (GENERATED column)

## Test strategy
- RED: schema test asserting UNIQUE constraint + GENERATED oee_pct + CHECK BETWEEN 0 AND 100 before schema exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test oee-snapshots-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not weaken uniqueness (V-PROD-10 — duplicate OEE rows would corrupt 15-OEE consumer)
- Do not let oee_pct be settable manually
- Do not skip RLS

pipeline_inputs.description: oee_snapshots table with GENERATED oee_pct, UNIQUE per minute key, V-PROD-25 component bounds.
pipeline_inputs.details: Per §9.9 SQL. PK BIGSERIAL. UNIQUE (tenant_id, line_id, shift_id, snapshot_minute) for V-PROD-10. CHECKs availability/performance/quality_pct BETWEEN 0 AND 100 (V-PROD-25). oee_pct GENERATED ALWAYS AS (a*p*q/10000) STORED. Index idx_oee_line_time(line_id, snapshot_minute DESC). 90-day retention noted in migration comment. RLS by tenant_id.

Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test oee-snapshots-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not let oee_pct be writable
